evidence_type: offline runtime/compiler test plus deterministic product-path inspection
freshness: current source/current build when local PANDA es2panda, ark, ark_disasm, verifier, and etsstdlib are available
mocks_used: No product mocks are used. External network, live providers, and device validation are disabled. Missing or broken local PANDA runtime/toolchain is reported as an environment blocker after compile/import/source checks.
